GENERAL_DESC: Minimal retro radio scale renderer derived from the Peppy approach, focused on web radio and stream playback.
ENABLED_DESC: Starts the radio scale renderer and polls Volumio state.
TUNING_STEP_DESC: Frequency delta per rotary detent for the tuning encoder.
SNAP_WINDOW_DESC: Distance where the pointer locks onto a station.
RELEASE_WINDOW_DESC: Distance where a locked station is released again.
NOISE_WINDOW_DESC: Distance that maps to full hiss / off-station behaviour.
AUTO_PLAY_ON_LOCK_DESC: Start the tuned station automatically when the pointer locks.
PAUSE_ON_UNLOCK_DESC: Pause playback when leaving a locked station.
